---
title: "Getting Started with CBAMM"
author: "CBAMM Package"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Getting Started with CBAMM}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.width = 7,
  fig.height = 5,
  eval = FALSE
)
```

# Getting Started with CBAMM

The CBAMM package provides comprehensive meta-analysis capabilities including cumulative meta-analysis.

## Installation and Loading

```{r eval=FALSE}
# Install from CRAN (when available)
# install.packages("cbamm")

# Load the package
library(cbamm)
```

## Quick Example

```{r eval=FALSE}
# Load example data
data(cumulative_example_data)

# Run cumulative meta-analysis
result <- cumulative_meta_analysis(cumulative_example_data, order_by = "year")
print(result)
```

This provides a foundation for meta-analysis research with R.
